data.content: Shipment complete. Merge commit bc1963b82eca already on origin/main (merged work/foolery-1f10-concurrent-fix). CI workflows passed: CI run 23303799900 (success) and Coverage Badge run 23303799969 (success). Features shipped: agent outcome stats with JSONL append for concurrent session safety, per-queue-type claim limits, lease lifecycle management, lease knots hidden from queue filters.
